# PERF-188 positive: fmt.Sscanf in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-188-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw := r.URL.Query().Get("n")
	var n int
	_, _ = fmt.Sscanf(raw, "%d", &n)
	w.WriteHeader(200)
	_ = n
}
